The former Duke of York was released under investigation after being held for 11 hours in police custody on suspicion of misconduct in public office. If you can’t read it Adults over 60 account for about a quarter of all serious cases of invasive meningococcal disease, a proportion that would surprise most people. The reason for this is something scientists call immunosenesence a gradual decline in immune function it means the body becomes less capable of mounting an effective response before a bacterial infection takes hold. Also older patients who develop the disease delay getting help often because they assume meningitis doesn’t represent a danger for their age group leading to worse outcomes

Guy Goma had his five minutes of fame in 2006 when - arriving at BBC headquarters for a data analyst job interview - he was ushered into the studio as 'a 'tech expert'. Rather than explain to the flustered producer why he was actually there, instead Mr Goma bluffed his way through the next few minutes of TV and gave his 'expert' opinion on a complicated High Court case involving Apple. The clip went viral and a legend was born.
